one_liner: AI agent monetization and cost-tracking platform with usage-based billing, metering, and gating via API

auth_methods.notes: Uses API keys as Bearer tokens in Authorization header. Keys are environment-specific (sk_test_ for sandbox, sk_live_ for production on Paygentic; pg_live_ for Paygent backend). Generated from dashboard settings.

self_serve_notes: Offers a free tier with 100,000 events per month and 1 year data retention. Developers can sign up at the website to obtain API keys and access full programmatic plan configuration and user management.

api_surface.notes: REST API with endpoints for plan configuration, usage events, metering, gating, and user management. Multiple services with different base URLs (api.paygentic.io, api.paygent.to). Supports JSON payloads with idempotency keys.

evidence.supports: API key authentication using Bearer tokens, self-serve key generation from dashboard
Backend API with Bearer token authentication (pg_live_ prefix)
Free tier with 100,000 events per month
Self-serve API access for plan configuration and metering via POST endpoints
REST API endpoints with JSON payloads for payment operations
